title: Coin sync — Workshops, Profile, and call timer
notes: FIX: Workshops tab coin chip now shows your real balance (was hardcoded 1,240)
FIX: Profile stats card (under your avatar) + Settings stats card both show real coins

CRITICAL FIX: Call timer now uses your REAL coin balance as the starting value (was hardcoded 1,240) — every call you've made since v3.25 launched was charging against a fake 1240, so deductions never matched your actual wallet
All 5 coin chips across the app now sync via the same useCoinBalance hook + Supabase realtime
